title: The Last Starship (1857080)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: The Last Starship
- Steam AppID of the game: 1857080

## System Information

- Kernel version:  6.8.0-58-generic

- Proton version: Proton Experimental

## I confirm:
- [ *] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [ *] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.



## Symptoms 
App crashes when trying to run Export to Steam for a ship

## Reproduction
Load game
Change focus to a ship you own
Run "Export to Steam"

title: Amazing Princess Sarah (315850)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues:Amazing Princess Sarah
- Steam AppID of the game:315850

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Vega 56/64
- Driver/LLVM version: Mesa 21.3.5
- Kernel version: 5.16.11
- Proton version:7.0

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms 
Game crashes after initial logo, before reaching title.

There is a crash information pointing at FAudio:XNA_PlaySong (Managed stacktrace).
After that Proton log shows stacktrace pointing at FAudio_close() as the location of crash.

## Reproduction
1. start game
2. observe game exit

[steam-315850.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8137812/steam-315850.log)

title: Horizon Zero Dawn (1151640) performance regression proton experimental
text:
First of all, the game looks and works great on my system, and thank you for that!
I just wanted to raise awareness that there is a performance regression in proton experimental.

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Horizon Zero Dawn
- Steam AppID of the game: 1151640

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT (navy_flounder)
- Driver/LLVM version: [mesa-git-22.1.20220221](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/xxmitsu/mesa-git/), LLVM 13.0.0, DRM 3.44
- Kernel version:  5.16.9-200.fc35.x86_64
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/vulturm/de076431e192af78de3fe4cb761efced
- Proton version: 7.0-1 vs Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms 

Proton experimental has regressed the performance for HZD  Proton 6.3 vs 7.0-1.
Performnace with 7.0-1: 
![Proton-7 0-1-mesa-c108a68](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1300842/155031951-3f50a728-01ae-4891-93b4-ea9361e8d122.jpg)
Perfomance with proton experimental

![Proton-exp-mesa-c108a68](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1300842/155031954-bbc93916-003e-4cba-a5b5-d0c8a94f0d42.jpg)

## Reproduction
I'm using Fedora 35 with [mesa-git copr](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/xxmitsu/mesa-git/), latest fedora provided kernel as of today: 5.16.9-200

Start the game with Ultimate quality preset and the following Display settings:
![game-settings](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1300842/155031950-6c9ca6a8-ed24-48a4-a1f4-386ae9a9a3b5.jpg)

Proton logs, if required:
[proton-7.0-1.tar.gz](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8112336/proton-7.0-1.tar.gz)
[proton-exp.tar.gz](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8112337/proton-exp.tar.gz)

metadata.issue_title: Horizon Zero Dawn (1151640) performance regression proton experimental

title: Mass Effect™ Legendary Edition (1328670)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Mass Effect™ Legendary Edition
- Steam AppID of the game: 1328670

## System Information
- GPU: AMD RX 5700
- Driver/LLVM version: Mesa 21.0.3 | LLVM 12.0
- Kernel version: 5.11.19
- Link to full system information report as Gist: [System information gist](https://gist.github.com/dennis1248/0f74784f3114fddf03519e49625ae5b7) 
- Proton version: 6.3-3 
## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Proton log
[steam-1328670.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/6479855/steam-1328670.log)

## Origin error log
_pfx/drive_c/ProgramData/Origin/Logs/MassEffectLauncher_OnlineActivation_Log.html_
```
Missing DLL: api-ms-win-core-psapi-ansi-l1-1-0.dll  Function: K32GetModuleBaseNameA
```

## Symptoms 
Origin client installs, after install when it attempts to launch the game it shows the following error "There is a problem with your game's setup. Please reinstall your game." afterwards nothing happens.

Any subsequent launch will show the same behaviour.

## Reproduction
1. Launch game
2. Let Steam install deps and wait for Origin client install to appear
3. Follow on-screen instructions to complete Origin client install
4. Wait for the error to show after the Origin client has launched and it attempts to start the game
